gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders; moreover, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.
